ARIA Assistant
Hub AI — ask anything about ie-SRA. Knows every module, wargame mechanics, installation energy resilience, and NAVFAC domain context.

SYS-01
SimRecon
Military installation readiness simulator — scenario simulation and live e-Recon intelligence panel. Combines wargame analysis with real-time reconnaissance across monitored nodes.

SYS-02 // ANALYTICS
Intelligent Analytics
Executive intelligence platform for DUERS energy data — AI analytics, manpower management, onboarding & certification, and performance reporting across all Navy installations.

SYS-03
Saved Scenarios & Recon
Persistent intelligence archive — saved scenario playbacks and catalogued recon site records. Review past simulation runs, compare grid failure outcomes, and browse geo-tagged installation intelligence entries.

Data Drop Zone

SYS-01 // SIMRECON HUB
SYS-01A
Scenario Simulator
A 7-phase scenario simulation of a grid failure at a major military installation — mapping, criticality tagging, outage trigger, backup activation, and resource depletion.
SELECT SCENARIO
SCENARIO A
NB San Diego
Utility outage · SDG&E substation failure
SCENARIO B
NS Norfolk
Hurricane Florence · Cat 3 landfall
7 Phases SDG&E Outage Warning Orders
7 Phases Hurricane Florence Warning Orders
SYS-01B
Site Recon Map
Live installation intelligence panel — real-time recon of military base energy posture, sensor feeds, and geospatial status via TomTom map integration.

Displays site-level telemetry, grid status overlays, and installation health across monitored nodes.
TomTom Map Live Telemetry Geo Intel
SYS-04
Data Drop Zone
Secure data ingest portal — structured upload zone for scenario datasets, sensor exports, NOAA weather archives, and DoD logistics files feeding SimRecon analysis.

Supports XLSX, CSV, JSON with auto-classification on ingest.
XLSX / CSV JSON Auto-Classify

SYS-03 // INTEL ARCHIVE
SYS-03A
Saved Scenarios
Scenario playback archive — browse and replay saved simulation runs from past wargame sessions. Compare grid failure outcomes across installations, review warning order sequences, and extract lessons-learned from completed exercises.

Each saved session preserves phase logs, asset deployments, and AI-generated assessments.
Playback Compare Runs Phase Logs
SYS-03B
Recon Sites
Geo-tagged installation intelligence catalog — catalogued recon site records from e-Recon sessions. Browse installation energy posture snapshots, sensor readings, and geospatial status entries collected across monitored nodes.

Filter by region, installation type, or readiness status to surface priority sites.
Geo Catalog Site Records Filter & Search
